dialogos.texto_en: Ahh... I'm so tired...
Phew, we managed to finish it without a hitch...\nI'm much more exhausted than I imagined...
Ahh...\nI never expected to have been this nervous...\nFinally, I can take a breather...
That's right...
Futaro, can I come in?
Yeah, sure.
Yo! Good work out there.
Woah, what now?\nWhy do you look so worn out?
It's tiring, you know.\nI was tense the whole time.
Are you okay with that?\nFrom now on, it'll be just you and Itsuki-chan,\nya know.
Father.
Hey, Itsuki-chan, you don't have to be so formal.\nIt's not necessary.
Well, it's a milestone of a day.\nPlease allow me to greet you properly.
From now on, as a member of the Uesugi family,\nI ask for your support.
Sure, same here.\nTake care of my idiotic son.
Heheh, you can leave that to me.
Hey, who's the idiotic son?
What's the matter?\nYou don't like it? Should I call you\nthe idiotic son who's bad at studying?
Ah, forget it.
And also, do your best as a teacher.
Yes, I will.
If anything, you can put Futaro aside for now.\nBe a good teacher, who prioritizes her students!
Wha?!
This guy might get sulky unexpectedly,\nbut you don't have to worry about it.
Dad! Stop saying whatever you want!
...Heheh!
Hey, Itsuki. You can ignore what Dad is saying.
But, I can't do that.\nIt's advice from your father,\nwho's raised you up to this point, Futaro.
That's right! Gahaha!
Ggh...!
Well, ya know, even I want you to do your best as a teacher%p-2;――
Oh, speaking of which, Dad.
What is it?
She was your mentor, right? Itsuki's mother.
Well, I guess.
In that case%p-2;――
Big bro, can I come in?
Did you finish changing?\nI'll return your suit.
Ah, yeah.\nThanks, Raiha.
Alright, I'll take off too, then.
Huh?\nWe still have things to talk about%p-2;――
Alrighty, have fun, you two newlyweds.
...Hey, was it better not to ask?
About that?
About your mother.\nAbout what kind of teacher she was, for example.
Yeah...it's fine.\nI probably won't ask about that any time soon.
I don't want to become my mother.\nThere's no need for it.
You're the one who taught me that, right?
...Ah, yeah, that's right.\nI asked something stupid.
No, it's fine.
When I look back...\ntruly, since I met you, my life has completely changed.
I've clashed and learned so many things.\nI can't imagine the version of myself\nthat didn't meet you.
That goes both ways.
(Come to think of it, I met Itsuki at the cafeteria,\n and everything started to change from there.)
Man... That was the worst first encounter.
Ah, you're horrible.
Since I met you, my life has also completely changed.\nYou're the root of all evil.
But isn't that my line?\nIt was shocking to encounter someone\nso lacking in delicacy.
Futaro, you're fine with saying things\nwithout delicacy, but you were incredibly nervous\nduring the kiss, right?
Huh?
During the vow kiss, you were trembling, remember?\nI thought it might not work.
That was...!
Even though it's not the first time.
Well, what can you do! Everyone was watching today!
Actually, speaking of that graduation trip,\nit was more on your end, right%p-2;――
Uwah! I'm sorry, I'm sorry!\nPlease don't say any more!
If that's the case,\ndon't bring it up in the first place.
Heheh, sorry, I really am.
Looking back now, those are also good memories.\nIncluding that encounter.
If we hadn't had that encounter,\nif we hadn't had the events in Okinawa...
Yeah, we might not be here, together as a couple.
That's why, even though it happened in that way,\nI truly feel fortunate to have met you.\nFrom the bottom of my heart.
I feel the same way as you.
Being together with you like this,\nis the greatest event in my life.
What are you saying, Itsuki?
Huh?
Even now, we're incredibly happy,\nbut there's still so much more to come, right?
Ah...
Our happiness isn't at its peak here.\nIf it's the two of us,\nwe can create an even happier future.
...Yes!
(Even with the worst first encounter, and all those clashes%p-2;――%p;)
Together, always.\nLet's make our best moments ones to last for eternity.
Yeah, of course.\nThat's what we vowed to do.
